jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Melorra - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Melorra in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
